methods.description: Collection of larvae from a specific location and analysis of their karyotype using the ethanol-orcein technique.

steps.description: Four IV instar larvae were collected from a small bay overgrown with sedge (Carex sp.) of an unnamed lake in Gydan Peninsula, Tazovskiy District, Yamalo-Nenets Autonomous Region.
All larvae were used for karyotype analysis by the ethanol-orcein technique.
steps.searchable_summary: perform karyotype analysis using ethanol-orcein technique

methods.description: Microscopy analysis of larvae using a light microscope and camera for morphological study.

steps.description: A Micromed-6C light microscope equipped with standard oil objective x100, and camera ToupCam5.1 were used for microscopy analysis.
steps.searchable_summary: use light microscope and camera for microscopy analysis

methods.description: Extraction of total DNA from larvae and amplification of the COI gene using specific primers.

steps.description: One larva was taken for the total DNA extraction using a 'M-sorb-OOM' kit with magnet particles according to the manufacturer's protocol.
For amplification of COI gene we used primers LCO1490 and HCO2198.
steps.searchable_summary: amplify COI gene using specific primers

steps.description: PCR performed at 94 °С (3 min), followed by 30 cycles at 94 °С (15 s), 50 °С (45 s), 72 °С (60 s) and a final one at 72 °С (8 min).
steps.searchable_summary: perform PCR with specified thermal cycling conditions

steps.description: PCR products were visualized on 1% agarose gels and later purified by ethanol and ammonium acetate.
steps.searchable_summary: visualize and purify PCR products using agarose gel and ethanol

methods.description: Alignment of COI nucleotide sequences and phylogenetic analysis using Bayesian inference.

steps.description: For alignment of COI nucleotide sequences we used MUSCLE algorithm in the MEGA6 software.
steps.searchable_summary: align COI sequences using MUSCLE in MEGA6

steps.description: The MEGA6 was used to calculate pairwise genetic distances Kimura 2-parameter (K2P).
steps.searchable_summary: calculate genetic distances using K2P in MEGA6

steps.description: The Bayesian analysis was performed using MrBayes v.3.2.6 software with settings suggested by Karmokov (2019).
The phylogenetic trees resulting in Bayesian inference analyses were visualized and edited using FigTree v.1.4.3 software.
